best_individual: sub(mul(step_penalty_multiplier(0.87, 0.592, 0.965), step_penalty_multiplier(0.959, distance, 0.876)), add(if_then_else(is_water, distance, steepness), step_penalty_adder(distance, distance, distance)))

hall_of_fame.individual: sub(mul(step_penalty_multiplier(0.87, 0.592, 0.965), step_penalty_multiplier(0.959, distance, 0.876)), add(if_then_else(is_water, distance, steepness), step_penalty_adder(distance, distance, distance)))
protected_pow(neg(mul(if_then_else(is_water, distance, distance), step_penalty_multiplier(distance, 0.876, distance))), sub(protected_log(distance, 0.901), steepness))
